metadata.name: Inquire About Room Service Menu After Hours

description: A guest calls late at night asking what is available from room service.

nodes.task_description: Inform the guest that the full room service menu is closed.

expected_outcome.value: The agent sets the correct expectation.

nodes.task_description: Present the options from the limited, overnight menu (e.g., sandwiches, salads).

expected_outcome.value: The agent clearly explains the available options.

nodes.task_description: Take the guest's order from the overnight menu.

expected_outcome.value: The guest places an order, which the agent processes.
